context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. Vault-seed-ready export audit fixed Silo, DS, and Homestead SSR public SDK subpaths; selected packages remain preflight-ready and covered by changesets.
current_tasks: Commit 5a4f3dce exposes @refarm.dev/silo ./collect and ./key-manager as typed package exports matching published files.
Commit 5a763846 exposes @refarm.dev/ds ./contract and ./theme-conformance as typed package exports matching published dist files.
Commit 1f2152c8 exposes @refarm.dev/homestead-ssr ./render and ./shell as typed package exports matching published dist files.
scripts/validate-packages.mjs now rejects missing Silo, DS, and Homestead SSR public SDK subpath exports, with coverage in scripts/ci/test-validate-packages-lib.mjs.

Validated focused package tests/builds, package-export self-reference probes, pnpm run validate-packages, refarm release preflight --selection vault-seed-ready --json, git diff --check, and after-commit finish for each changed package.
Audited dispatch-surface: README explicitly says external consumers import package root only, and public-api tests lock the curated root surface, so no subpath export change is needed.
next_actions: Continue vault-seed-ready publication prep by running the heavier pnpm run release:vault-seed:check once when ready for publish dry-run evidence; avoid repeating it unnecessarily.
Keep future SDK export audits focused on packages that publish dist submodules without a documented root-only boundary; dispatch-surface is intentionally root-only.
For agents-as-tools, consume assessWorkerToolReadiness() as the promotion gate; implement runtime-dispatch only after policy, cancellation, observability, and cost-control proofs are local and cheap.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
